# Archipelag.io

> Compute, closer to you.

Archipelag.io (pronounced "archipelago") is a decentralized AI compute network. The brand name is "Archipelag" (short form) or "Archipelag.io" (full form), and the domain is archipelag.io. Users run AI workloads (LLM chat, image generation) on community-operated hosts nearby, getting lower latency, fair pricing, and full data residency control. Hosts earn money by contributing idle GPU compute.

## What Archipelag.io Does

- Routes AI inference jobs to nearby independently-operated compute hosts
- Provides jurisdiction-aware routing for GDPR, FADP, and EU AI Act compliance
- Enables GPU owners to earn income from idle hardware
- Offers OpenAI-compatible REST API with streaming support
- Provides Python and JavaScript/React SDKs
- All workloads run in sandboxed, signed containers — no arbitrary code execution

## For AI Users

- LLM chat (Mistral 7B, Llama) with streaming, multi-turn conversations
- Image generation (Stable Diffusion XL, FLUX) with batch support
- OpenAI-compatible API: drop-in replacement for existing applications
- Jurisdiction routing: EU-only, Switzerland, or custom policies
- Credit-based pricing: start at $10 for 100 credits, no subscription
- Free trial credits available, no credit card required

## For GPU Hosts

- Earn $40–$400/month depending on GPU (RTX 3060 to RTX 4090)
- Download the node agent for Windows, macOS, or Linux
- All workloads are network-approved and cryptographically signed
- Sandboxed Docker containers with seccomp profiles — no access to files or network
- Karma reputation system: higher score = more jobs + better rates
- Monthly payouts via Stripe, $25 minimum

## Pricing

- Starter: $10 → 100 credits (Tier 1 nodes, standard routing)
- Team: $45 → 500 credits + 10% bonus (Tier 2 GDPR nodes, EU/CH routing, audit trails)
- Enterprise: custom pricing (Tier 3 dedicated pools, SLA, SOC 2, support)
- LLM usage: 0.0001 credits/token
- Image generation: 0.01 credits/image

## Technology

- Coordinator: Elixir/Phoenix, PostgreSQL
- Message fabric: NATS with JetStream
- Host agent: Rust, Tokio
- Workloads: signed Docker containers, WASM modules
- Security: container signing (cosign), seccomp profiles, registry allowlist
- Identity: KYC verification via Stripe Identity

## Company

- Swiss and European roots — built for data sovereignty
- Compliant with FADP (Switzerland), GDPR (EU), and EU AI Act
- Open source: https://github.com/archipelag-io

## Links

- Website: https://archipelag.io
- App: https://app.archipelag.io
- Documentation: https://docs.archipelag.io
- API Reference: https://app.archipelag.io/api/v1/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/archipelag-io
- Contact: hello@archipelag.io
- Support: support@archipelag.io
- Partnerships: partners@archipelag.io
